task: Write the filesystem-backed task orchestration protocol to a doc, create a task state directory, spawn planner/executor/reviewer/viewer/summarizer subagents, and integrate their results.
summary: Created docs/task-orchestration.md, task-local state under .datalox/tasks/2026-05-03-orchestration-protocol, spawned five role workers from typed assignment packets, and integrated their findings into the protocol and final task summary.
observations: docs/task-orchestration.md stores the requested task directory layout, typed assignment packet, typed result packet, role semantics, orchestrator rules, and product boundary.
Worker results identified missing reusable-protocol details, so the doc now includes datalox.changed_files.v1, datalox.task_event.v1, lifecycle states, artifact ownership, and integration gate rules.
The task directory contains task.json, plan.md, context files, assignment/result/changed-files packets for planner/executor/reviewer/viewer/summarizer, events.jsonl, and final.md.
README.md and docs/project-overview.md now link to docs/task-orchestration.md for discoverability.
Validation parsed 18 JSON task files and 4 JSONL events. Datalox lint returned ok with existing warning-level wiki-reference issues.
title: Created docs/task-orchestration.md, task-local state under .datalox/tasks/2026-05-03-orchestration-protocol, spawned fi…
signal: docs/task-orchestration.md stores the requested task directory layout, typed assignment packet, typed result packet, role semantics, orchestrator rules, and product boundary.
outcome: Completed the orchestration task and closed all spawned agents. No product-boundary blocker was found; orchestration remains process infrastructure and does not reintroduce legacy note/skill promotion as a product loop.
